page: Google Cloud Platform a3-edgegpu-8g-nolssd is an accelerator-optimized server featuring eight NVIDIA H100 Hopper GPUs with a total of 637 GB of VRAM. The system is powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor with an x86_64 architecture, providing 208 dedicated vCPUs across 104 physical cores. It includes 1872.0 GB of system memory, yielding 9.0 GB per core, and a 105 MB L3 cache. This configuration does not include local SSD storage.

In benchmark testing, the server demonstrates top-tier multi-core CPU performance, ranking in the top 10% for stress-ng multi-core and PassMark CPU tests. It also achieves top-tier results in memory bandwidth, with large-block read speeds of 430.93 GB/sec and write speeds of 186.18 GB/sec. Single-core performance is moderate, placing in the middle 50% for stress-ng single-core tests. The processor supports advanced instruction sets, including Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX-512) and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) for tile and INT8 operations.

The qualitative cost profile of this server reflects its high-density accelerator architecture, which is designed for massive parallel processing. A key tradeoff is the complete absence of local SSD storage, meaning all data persistence must rely on network-attached storage. This server is designed for workloads such as large-scale machine learning, artificial intelligence training, ray tracing, and multi-threaded data processing.
description: Google Cloud Platform a3-edgegpu-8g-nolssd is an accelerator-optimized server configured with eight NVIDIA H100 Hopper GPUs providing 637 GB of total VRAM. It features an Intel Xeon 8481C processor with 208 dedicated vCPUs, 104 physical cores, and 1872.0 GB of system memory. The architecture supports Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) and AVX-512. In benchmark evaluations, the server delivers top-tier multi-core CPU performance and high memory bandwidth, though single-core performance remains in the average tier. This server does not include local SSD storage, requiring external storage solutions. It is designed for parallel computing tasks, including machine learning model training, ray tracing, and database operations.

tagline: An accelerator-optimized architecture featuring eight hardware GPUs and high-capacity system memory for intensive parallel processing workloads.
